name: SmartMouth Design Tokens — Typography
description: Clean, modern sans-serif hierarchy. Scientific credibility without coldness. Monospace reserved for clinical data and technical specs only.

primary.family: Inter, 'DM Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
primary.usage: All headings, body copy, UI elements
primary.character: Clean, modern, highly legible — conveys professionalism without being stiff

monospace.usage: Clinical percentages, scientific callouts, ingredient data, technical specs

display.usage: Hero headlines: 'Never Have Bad Breath', primary campaign messages

h3.usage: Card titles, feature names, product names

caption.usage: Image captions, legal disclaimers, source citations

overline.usage: Category labels, product line labels, badge text

notes: Avoid decorative or serif typefaces — they undercut the clinical credibility positioning. Headlines should be direct and bold. Body copy should be highly readable at small sizes.
